//: AGENT-PAY-2 (over-cap, CROSS-RAIL) — a RECORDED x402/USDC settlement RESPONSE for a call that, ON TOP of $4.50 already settled across the Stripe + x402 rails, would push the ONE cross-rail cap past $5. The moat (PRD §11): this x402 amount ($0.60) read in a per-rail x402 silo is tiny, but summed into the cross-rail counter it crosses the cap. The reservation must refuse usage-cap-exceeded BEFORE the x402 facilitator settles. x402 SettlementResponse shape (coinbase/x402 v1 spec); network=base-sepolia (testnet). 600000 atomic USDC (6 decimals) = 0.60 USDC = 60 cents.

//defense: 600000 atomic USDC = 60 cents; with $4.50 already cross-rail-settled, reserving this would be $5.10 across rails > $5 cap → must refuse usage-cap-exceeded BEFORE the x402 facilitator settles.
